NewsApp’s documentation!¶

models.py

Defines the database models for the News application.

class news.models.ApprovedArticleLog(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Internal log created when an article is approved and POSTed to /api/approved/. Simulates external distribution.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶
class news.models.Article(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

A news article authored by a journalist. Can be independent (no publisher) or published under a Publisher. Approval is managed by editors and triggers email/API notifications.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶
class news.models.CustomUser(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Extended user model with role-based access. Roles: reader, editor, journalist. Reader fields store subscriptions; journalist fields use reverse FKs.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶
save(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Clear subscription fields for non-reader roles after save.

class news.models.Newsletter(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

A curated collection of approved articles. Created and managed by journalists or editors. Viewable by all authenticated users.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶
class news.models.Publisher(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

A publication that groups multiple journalists under editor oversight. Journalists and editors are tracked via ManyToMany.

exception DoesNotExist¶
exception MultipleObjectsReturned¶
exception NotUpdated¶

views.py

Handles the request/response logic for the News application.

news.views.approve_article_view(request, pk)[source]¶

Approve or reject a pending article (editors only).

news.views.article_create_view(request)[source]¶

Create a new article (journalists only).

news.views.article_delete_view(request, pk)[source]¶

Delete an article — journalists (own) or editors (any).

news.views.article_detail_view(request, pk)[source]¶

View a single approved article.

news.views.article_edit_view(request, pk)[source]¶

Edit an article — journalists (own only) or editors (any).

news.views.article_list_view(request)[source]¶

Browse all approved articles with optional search.

news.views.editor_dashboard_view(request)[source]¶

Editor dashboard: pending articles awaiting approval.

news.views.home_view(request)[source]¶

Home page: recent approved articles and publisher highlights.

news.views.login_view(request)[source]¶

Authenticate and log in a user.

news.views.logout_view(request)[source]¶

Log out the current user.

news.views.newsletter_create_view(request)[source]¶

Create a newsletter (journalists/editors only).

news.views.newsletter_detail_view(request, pk)[source]¶

View a single newsletter.

news.views.newsletter_list_view(request)[source]¶

View all newsletters.

news.views.profile_view(request)[source]¶

User profile page. - Readers can manage their subscriptions. - Journalists can see all their articles (approved and pending)

and edit or delete pending ones.

news.views.publisher_create_view(request)[source]¶

Create a new publisher (editors only).

news.views.publisher_edit_view(request, pk)[source]¶

Edit a publisher and reassign editors/journalists (editors only).

news.views.publisher_list_view(request)[source]¶

Public list of all publishers.

news.views.register_view(request)[source]¶

Register a new user and log them in immediately.

urls.py

URL routing configuration for the News application.
